title: Marvin's Magic - Scratch Art Kit for Kids - 36 Rainbow Sheets, 4 Wooden Styluses, Stencils & Spirograph - Creative DIY Drawing Paper for Boys & Girls - Arts & Crafts Gift Set Ages 5-12
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes 36 rainbow scratch sheets, 4 wooden styluses, stencils, and a spirograph—everything kids need for endless creative fun at home or on the go
FUN & MESS-FREE CREATIVITY:No paints, no glue, no mess! Kids simply scratch away the black surface to reveal vibrant rainbow colors underneath—ideal for classrooms, parties, or rainy days.
PERFECT FOR AGES 5 AND UP: Designed for young artists ages 5–12, this scratch paper kit is a screen-free way to encourage imagination, hand-eye coordination, and fine motor skills.
BONUS STENCIL & SPIROGRAPH INCLUDED: Elevate art time with reusable stencils and a spirograph tool—great for making cool shapes, mandalas, and intricate designs kids will love showing off
PORTABLE & GREAT FOR TRAVEL: Lightweight and easy to pack, this art kit is perfect for car rides, restaurants, or plane trips—entertain your child anywhere, anytime.
description: Unleash your child’s imagination with this all-in-one Scratch Art Kit—a vibrant and mess-free way to create magical works of art! With 36 premium rainbow scratch sheets, 4 smooth wooden styluses, creative stencils, and a spirograph wheel, your little artist has everything they need to explore endless designs, patterns, and doodles. Whether it’s a rainy afternoon, a birthday party, or a long car trip, this kit provides hours of screen-free entertainment while encouraging creativity, concentration, and fine motor skill development. Made with non-toxic materials and designed with young kids in mind, it’s a safe and exciting gift for boys and girls ages 5–12. Perfect for crafting cards, personalizing gifts, or just having fun, the Scratch Art Kit is a delightful way to keep your child happily engaged—at home, at school, or on the go.
